description: Create domain architecture comparison between active rhomboid protease and UBAC2 pseudoprotease showing absence of catalytic residues
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1, 1, 1.5]})

# --- Panel 1: Active Rhomboid (RHBDL2) domain architecture ---
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_xlim(0, 350)
ax.set_ylim(-2, 4)
ax.set_title('Active Rhomboid Protease (RHBDL2, 303 aa)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='darkgreen')

# Backbone
ax.barh(1, 303, height=0.8, left=0, color='#e8e8e8', edgecolor='gray')

# 7 TM segments (approximate positions for RHBDL2)
tm_positions = [(37,57), (67,87), (99,119), (134,154), (175,195), (214,234), (256,276)]
for i, (s, e) in enumerate(tm_positions):
    ax.barh(1, e-s, height=0.8, left=s, color='#4CAF50', edgecolor='darkgreen', linewidth=1)
    if i == 3:  # TM4 with catalytic Ser
        ax.barh(1, e-s, height=0.8, left=s, color='#FF5722', edgecolor='darkred', linewidth=2)
        ax.annotate('GxSG\n(cat. Ser)', xy=(s+(e-s)/2, 0.2), ha='center', fontsize=7, 
                   fontweight='bold', color='darkred')
    if i == 5:  # TM6 with catalytic His
        ax.barh(1, e-s, height=0.8, left=s, color='#FF9800', edgecolor='darkorange', linewidth=2)
        ax.annotate('Cat. His', xy=(s+(e-s)/2, 0.2), ha='center', fontsize=7,
                   fontweight='bold', color='darkorange')

ax.text(150, 2.5, '7 TM segments • Catalytic Ser-His dyad PRESENT • Active protease ✓', 
        ha='center', fontsize=9, color='darkgreen', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# --- Panel 2: UBAC2 domain architecture ---
ax = axes[1]
ax.set_xlim(0, 350)
ax.set_ylim(-2, 4)
ax.set_title('UBAC2 - Rhomboid Pseudoprotease (344 aa)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='#D32F2F')

# Backbone
ax.barh(1, 344, height=0.8, left=0, color='#e8e8e8', edgecolor='gray')

# 3 TM segments
tm_ubac2 = [(92, 112), (126, 146), (164, 184)]
for s, e in tm_ubac2:
    ax.barh(1, e-s, height=0.8, left=s, color='#90CAF9', edgecolor='#1565C0', linewidth=1)

# UBA domain
ax.barh(1, 40, height=0.8, left=304, color='#CE93D8', edgecolor='#6A1B9A', linewidth=1.5)
ax.annotate('UBA', xy=(324, 1), ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# LIR motif
ax.barh(1, 4, height=0.8, left=275, color='#FFD54F', edgecolor='#F57F17', linewidth=1.5)
ax.annotate('LIR', xy=(277, 0.2), ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='#F57F17')

# Mark ABSENCE of catalytic residues
ax.annotate('No GxSG in any TM', xy=(138, 2.3), ha='center', fontsize=9, 
           color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax.annotate('Only 3 TM segments', xy=(138, 3.0), ha='center', fontsize=9, 
           color='red', fontweight='bold')

# X marks where catalytic residues would be
for s, e in tm_ubac2:
    mid = s + (e-s)/2
    ax.plot(mid, 1, 'x', color='red', markersize=10, markeredgewidth=2)

ax.text(280, 2.8, 'Catalytic Ser-His dyad ABSENT ✗', 
        ha='center', fontsize=9, color='#D32F2F', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_yticks([])
ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# --- Panel 3: Evidence summary table ---
ax = axes[2]
ax.axis('off')
ax.set_title('Evidence Against Serine Endopeptidase Activity for UBAC2', 
            fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

table_data = [
    ['Feature', 'Active Rhomboid (RHBDL2)', 'UBAC2', 'Assessment'],
    ['GxSG catalytic motif', 'GASG at pos 185 (in TM4)', 'GSSG at pos 6 (N-term, NOT in TM)', 'ABSENT ✗'],
    ['Catalytic His (TM6)', 'Present', 'Not present in TM context', 'ABSENT ✗'],
    ['TM segment count', '7 segments', '3 segments', 'Insufficient ✗'],
    ['Protease activity shown', 'Yes (biochemical assays)', 'Never demonstrated', 'No evidence ✗'],
    ['Classified as pseudoprotease', 'No', 'Yes (PMID:23297223, InterPro)', 'PSEUDOPROTEASE'],
    ['Known function', 'Intramembrane proteolysis', 'ER-phagy receptor', 'Non-catalytic'],
]

colors_header = ['#263238'] * 4
colors_good = ['#E8F5E9', '#E8F5E9', '#FFEBEE', '#FFEBEE']
cell_colors = [colors_header]
for i in range(1, len(table_data)):
    cell_colors.append(colors_good)

table = ax.table(cellText=table_data, loc='center', cellLoc='center',
                colWidths=[0.2, 0.3, 0.3, 0.2])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 1.5)

# Style header
for j in range(4):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#37474F')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

# Style data rows
for i in range(1, len(table_data)):
    for j in range(4):
        if j <= 1:
            table[i, j].set_facecolor('#E8F5E9')
        elif j == 2:
            table[i, j].set_facecolor('#FFEBEE')
        else:
            table[i, j].set_facecolor('#FFCDD2')
            table[i, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='#C62828')

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#4CAF50', edgecolor='darkgreen', label='TM segment'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF5722', edgecolor='darkred', label='Catalytic Ser (GxSG)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF9800', edgecolor='darkorange', label='Catalytic His'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#90CAF9', edgecolor='#1565C0', label='TM (no catalytic residues)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#CE93D8', edgecolor='#6A1B9A', label='UBA domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFD54F', edgecolor='#F57F17', label='LIR motif'),
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=6, fontsize=8,
          bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.02))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('ubac2_domain_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Domain comparison figure saved.")
